name: hookdeck-agent-skills
description: Hookdeck plugin marketplace: skills for Hookdeck Event Gateway and Hookdeck Outpost.

plugins.name: hookdeck-skills
plugins.description: Skills for working with Hookdeck Event Gateway (receive, queue, route, and deliver webhooks) and Hookdeck Outpost (send webhooks and events to user-preferred destinations). Includes a router skill that delegates to event-gateway or outpost based on the task.
